steps.title: Translate the inequality
steps.content:
The phrase at most means less than or equal to. The phrase $5$ less than $4$ times $y$ means $4y-5$, so:
$$x\leq 4y-5$$

steps.title: Substitute the value
steps.content:
Use $y=-3$:
$$x\leq 4(-3)-5$$
$$x\leq -12-5$$
So the greatest possible value is the right side of the inequality. The answer is -17.
